name: Teya 22" Marble Table Lamp - TBL3029 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Teya Table Lamp, a stylish blend of elegance and modern design. This table lamp boasts a striking black marble body, bringing a touch of sophistication to any room. Its complementing fabric shade softens the glow, providing a warm and inviting ambiance. Perfect for your living room, bedroom, or study, the Teya lamp adds a tasteful accent to your decor. Its minimalist design makes it versatile, fitting seamlessly with various decor styles. Transform your lighting with the Teya table lamp - a fusion of art and utility, made to enhance your surroundings.
